visual_description: (00:00-00:05) In a dimly lit room, a person with blonde hair, seen from behind, embraces another person. The blonde person is wearing a grey hoodie. The person they are hugging is wearing a dark jacket. The blonde person speaks to the other, who seems to be crying. (Storyline: The scene opens on an emotional moment, establishing a close, comforting relationship between two people. One is clearly distressed and seeking solace from the other.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Reassuring, gentle. 2) Background sounds or music: A child is crying and whimpering.)
